# PdfPixels

> Free online PDF and image tools for compression, conversion, editing, and AI-assisted workflows.

## About

PdfPixels is a browser-based platform for PDF and image tasks such as compressing PDFs, merging files, splitting documents, resizing images, converting formats, and removing backgrounds. Core workflows are available without signup.

## Core Workflows

- **Compress Image**: Reduce JPG, PNG, WebP, and related image file sizes.
- **Resize Image**: Change image dimensions in pixels, cm, or inches.
- **Remove Background**: Use AI to isolate subjects and export transparent PNG files.
- **Compress PDF**: Reduce PDF file size for upload and sharing.
- **Merge PDF**: Combine multiple PDF files into one document.
- **Split PDF**: Extract selected pages or split a PDF into separate files.
- **Image to PDF**: Convert one or more images into a PDF.
- **HEIC to JPG**: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG online.

## Technical Notes

- **Website**: https://www.pdfpixels.com
- **Pricing**: Core tools are free to use
- **Signup**: Not required for core workflows
- **Platform coverage**: PDF tools, image tools, AI workflows, tutorials, comparisons, and use cases
- **API docs**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/api-docs
- **RSS feed**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/feed
- **Sitemaps**:
  - https://www.pdfpixels.com/sitemap.xml
  - https://www.pdfpixels.com/image-sitemap.xml

- Homepage: https://www.pdfpixels.com
- Blog: https://www.pdfpixels.com/blog
